title: Sairanthus glutinosus
taxonomy: Sairanthus glutinosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. This family is a part of the larger order Asterales. The Goodeniaceae family is native to Australia and contains around 100 species. The classification of Sairanthus glutinosus is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Asterales, Family: Goodeniaceae, Genus: Sairanthus, Species: S. glutinosus.
